channel.title: GitHub Elixir Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of Elixir in GitHub

item.title: phoenixframework/phoenix
item.description: Peace of mind from prototype to production

item.title: absinthe-graphql/absinthe
item.description: The GraphQL toolkit for Elixir

item.title: adriankumpf/teslamate
item.description: A self-hosted data logger for your Tesla 🚘

item.title: discord/instruments
item.description: Simple and Fast metrics for Elixir

item.title: elixir-ecto/ecto
item.description: A toolkit for data mapping and language integrated query.

item.title: discord/zen_monitor
item.description: Efficient Process.monitor replacement

item.title: discord/gen_registry
item.description: Simple and efficient local Process Registry

item.title: discord/deque
item.description: Fast bounded deque using two rotating lists.

item.title: discord/ex_hash_ring
item.description: A fast consistent hash ring implementation in Elixir.

item.title: discord/semaphore
item.description: Fast semaphore using ETS.

item.title: discord/manifold
item.description: Fast batch message passing between nodes for Erlang/Elixir.

item.title: phoenixframework/phoenix_live_view
item.description: Rich, real-time user experiences with server-rendered HTML

item.title: bors-ng/bors-ng
item.description: 👁 A merge bot for GitHub Pull Requests

item.title: elixir-nx/livebook
item.description: Interactive and collaborative code notebooks - made with Phoenix LiveView

item.title: surface-ui/surface
item.description: A server-side rendering component library for Phoenix

item.title: Hentioe/policr-mini
item.description: 更加现代的 Policr 迷你版

item.title: sorentwo/oban
item.description: 💎 Robust job processing in Elixir, backed by modern PostgreSQL

item.title: papercups-io/papercups
item.description: Open-source live customer chat

item.title: Phineas/lanyard
item.description: 🏷️   Expose your Discord presence and activities to a RESTful API and WebSocket in less than 10 seconds

item.title: blockscout/blockscout
item.description: Blockchain explorer for Ethereum based network and a tool for inspecting and analyzing EVM based blockchains.

item.title: christopheradams/elixir_style_guide
item.description: A community driven style guide for Elixir

item.title: Dalgona/neodgm
item.description: Modern TrueType font based on an old-but-good Korean bitmap font.

item.title: plausible/analytics
item.description: Simple, open-source, lightweight (< 1 KB) and privacy-friendly web analytics alternative to Google Analytics.

item.title: still-ex/still
item.description: A composable Elixir static site generator
